final:
module mux4to1 (
    input wire [3:0] data_in, // 4 inputs
    input wire [1:0] sel, // 2-bit select signal
    output wire out // output
);
    assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? data_in[0] :
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? data_in[1] :
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? data_in[2] :
                 data_in[3]; // default case selects the last input
endmodule
